# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: production
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build_test:
    name: Build and Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        run: npm test --if-present

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build_test
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_COMMAND }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_COMMAND" ]; then
            echo "Missing secret: DEPLOY_COMMAND"
            exit 1
          fi
          bash -lc "$DEPLOY_COMMAND"
